description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named CI/CD that automates testing, building, releasing, and documenting an Ansible collection. The workflow triggers on pushes to specific branches, pull requests, and a scheduled cron job. It consists of multiple jobs: sanity checks code formatting and runs tests; build creates the collection; auto-merge handles Dependabot pull requests; release publishes the collection to Galaxy; and docs generates and deploys documentation to GitHub Pages.
